purpose: 验证 Skill 列表页面基础渲染与筛选能力

skills.name: Text Summarizer
skills.description: Generates concise summaries from long-form text documents using extractive and abstractive techniques.
skills.author: AI Labs

skills.name: Sentiment Analyzer
skills.description: Analyzes text sentiment and returns positive, negative, or neutral scores with confidence levels.
skills.author: NLP Corp

skills.name: Grammar Checker
skills.description: Detects and corrects grammatical errors, spelling mistakes, and style issues in written content.
skills.author: WriteTools

skills.name: Language Translator
skills.description: Translates text between 50+ languages with context-aware accuracy and tone preservation.
skills.author: TranslateAI

skills.name: Keyword Extractor
skills.description: Extracts relevant keywords and key phrases from documents for indexing and tagging.
skills.author: DataMiner

skills.name: Image Generator
skills.description: Creates photorealistic images from text prompts using diffusion-based generative models.
skills.author: VisionAI

skills.name: Background Remover
skills.description: Automatically removes backgrounds from images and replaces them with transparent or custom backgrounds.
skills.author: PhotoTools

skills.name: Object Detector
skills.description: Detects and labels objects in images with bounding boxes and confidence scores.
skills.author: VisionAI

skills.name: Image Upscaler
skills.description: Upscales low-resolution images to higher resolutions while preserving detail and sharpness.
skills.author: EnhanceAI

skills.name: Style Transfer
skills.description: Applies artistic styles from reference images to target photos using neural style transfer.
skills.author: ArtEngine

skills.name: Data Cleaner
skills.description: Automatically cleans messy datasets by handling missing values, duplicates, and inconsistent formats.
skills.author: DataWorks

skills.name: CSV Parser
skills.description: Parses CSV files with automatic delimiter detection, encoding handling, and schema inference.
skills.author: DataWorks

skills.name: Chart Generator
skills.description: Generates interactive charts and visualizations from structured data in multiple formats.
skills.author: VizLab

skills.name: Data Validator
skills.description: Validates data against configurable schemas and rules, returning detailed error reports.
skills.author: QualityAI

skills.name: Statistical Analyzer
skills.description: Computes descriptive and inferential statistics with hypothesis testing and regression analysis.
skills.author: StatsPro

skills.name: API Caller
skills.description: Makes HTTP requests to external APIs with retry logic, rate limiting, and response caching.
skills.author: DevTools

skills.name: Web Scraper
skills.description: Extracts structured data from web pages with CSS selector support and pagination handling.
skills.author: ScrapeAI

skills.name: Code Executor
skills.description: Safely executes code snippets in sandboxed environments with language support for Python, JS, and more.
skills.author: RunBox

skills.name: File Converter
skills.description: Converts files between formats including PDF, DOCX, XLSX, JSON, and CSV with batch support.
skills.author: ConvertPro

skills.name: Cron Scheduler
skills.description: Schedules and manages recurring tasks with cron expressions, timezone support, and failure alerts.
skills.author: TaskFlow
